raw_consumer_statement:
From the year of XXXX to XXXX I have been continuously getting charged by the company " XXXX ''. I have notified my bank Citibank to stop payment from the company XXXX. I had a contract with XXXX from XX/XX/XXXX to XX/XX/XXXX. On XXXX XXXX I notified XXXX through a phone call that I will no longer be renewing my contract which will end XX/XX/XXXX. I was charged XX/XX/XXXX {$XXXX}. On XXXX XXXX I contacted XXXX for a refund and to stop further payments to my credit card and bank account. On XXXX XXXX XXXX I notified my bank Citibank to freeze my account and send me a new card and to dispute the matter. I received no refund. I am a business owner and got distracted from working 6 days, sometimes 7 days a week. I do not check my credit card statements often. 
About every XXXX to XXXX  months I come across more charges from " XXXX ". Again I notify Citibank through phone calls about these unauthorized charges and again I ask them why and what is going on? And again I have to explain the situation all over again. I have all my statements from XXXX showing the charges. I make my monthly payments. I freezed my account since XXXX 6 times. each time getting a new account number and credit card. with reassurance from Citibank that XXXX will no longer get access to my account and I will receive my refund. 
On XX/XX/XXXX They investigated XXXX charge from XXXX for {$XXXX} and found it to be my fault. They refunded it to me at first then reversed it back on XXXX XXXX. I received only XXXX refund. XXXX XXXX for the amount of {$XXXX}. 
I have made numerous phone calls with Citibank and keep getting the runaround. I have recordings of several phone conversations with supervisors reassuring me I will receive a refund, and this matter will get resolved. Which has not. 
Dates XXXX has charged me and received unauthorized payments from my bank : XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX} Total of unauthorized charges : XXXX
